title: 五眼联盟警告：前沿AI数月内将大幅升级网络攻击
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Five Eyes cyber agencies warned that frontier AI models capable of dramatically escalating cyberattacks against governments and businesses may be only months away, not years. Via The Guardian
The warning comes after the US blocked foreign nationals from accessing Anthropic’s Fable model, amid fears that systems like Mythos and Fable could transform both offensive and defensive cybersecurity.
"Frontier AI models are anticipated to exceed current industry expectations, fundamentally transforming both offensive and defensive cyber capabilities. The timeline is not years, it is months,” the warning by Five Eyes’ agencies said."
3:15 PM · Jun 22, 2026 35.8K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 五眼联盟警告：前沿AI数月内将大幅升级网络攻击
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 五眼联盟（Five Eyes）网络机构警告，能够显著升级针对政府和企业的网络攻击的前沿AI模型可能仅需数月（而非数年）就能实现。该机构称前沿AI模型预计将超出当前行业预期，从根本上改变攻防网络能力。此前美国已禁止外国人访问Anthropic的Fable模型，担忧Mythos和Fable等系统可能同时改变进攻性和防御性网络安全。

key_excerpts.text: 五眼联盟（Five Eyes）网络机构警告，能够显著升级针对政府和企业的网络攻击的前沿AI模型可能仅需数月（而非数年）就能实现。该机构称前沿AI模型预计将超出当前行业预期，从根本上改变攻防网络能力。此前美国已禁止外国人访问Anthropic的Fable模型，担忧Mythos和Fable等系统可能同时改变进攻性和防御性网络安全。

Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus Five Eyes cyber agencies warned that frontier AI models capable of dramatically escalating cyberattacks against governments and businesses may be only months away, not years.

Via The Guardian The warning comes after the US blocked foreign nationals from accessing Anthropic’s Fable model, amid fears that systems like Mythos and Fable could transform both offensive and defensive cybersecurity.
"Frontier AI models are anticipated to exceed current industry expectations, fundamentally transforming both offensive and defensive cyber capabilities.
The timeline is not years, it is months,” the warning by Five Eyes’ agencies said.
